'''vamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:qualitywise|qualitywise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qualitywise|qualitywise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vamate|vamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vamatesher|vamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vamatesherĂ«m|vamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vamatero|vamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vamateshĂ«|vamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vamateshĂ«m|vamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivamatero|gokivamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivamateshĂ«|gokivamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivamateshĂ«m|gokivamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govamankerom|govamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govamankeshĂ«|govamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govamankeshĂ«m|govamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govamankeya|govamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vamaterom|vamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vamatemu|vamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vamateya|vamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivamaterom|gokivamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivamatemu|gokivamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivamateya|gokivamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vamamate|vamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vamamatesher|vamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vamamatesherĂ«m|vamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vamamatero|vamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vamamateshĂ«|vamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vamamateshĂ«m|vamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivamamatero|gokivamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivamamateshĂ«|gokivamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivamamateshĂ«m|gokivamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govamamankerom|govamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govamamankeshĂ«|govamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govamamankeshĂ«m|govamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govamamankeya|govamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vamamaterom|vamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vamamatemu|vamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vamamateya|vamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivamamaterom|gokivamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivamamatemu|gokivamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivamamateya|gokivamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠmĂŠte|vĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠmĂŠtesher|vĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠmĂŠtero|vĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠmĂŠtero|gokivĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠmĂŠnkerom|govĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠmĂŠnkeya|govĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠmĂŠterom|vĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠmĂŠtemu|vĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠmĂŠteya|vĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠmĂŠterom|gokivĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠmĂŠteya|gokivĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafmafte|vafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafmaftesher|vafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafmaftesherĂ«m|vafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafmaftero|vafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafmafteshĂ«|vafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafmafteshĂ«m|vafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafmaftero|gokivafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafmafteshĂ«|gokivafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafmafteshĂ«m|gokivafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafmafnkerom|govafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafmafnkeshĂ«|govafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafmafnkeshĂ«m|govafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafmafnkeya|govafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafmafterom|vafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafmaftemu|vafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafmafteya|vafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafmafterom|gokivafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafmaftemu|gokivafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafmafteya|gokivafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
